---
title: "ChanWe Themes in Quarto Workflows"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{ChanWe Themes in Quarto Workflows}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 4.2
)
```

```{r}
library(chanwer)
```

## Palette and Tokens

```{r}
chanwe_palette()
chanwe_brand_tokens()$semantic
```

```{r, fig.height = 5.5}
chanwe_preview_palette("chart")
```

## ggplot2

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, color = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_chanwe_d() +
  labs(
    title = "Fuel economy by weight",
    subtitle = "ChanWe discrete color scale",
    caption = "Source: mtcars"
  ) +
  theme_chanwe()
```

```{r}
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, color = hp)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_chanwe_c() +
  theme_chanwe()
```

## gt

```{r}
mt <- tibble::as_tibble(mtcars, rownames = "model")
mt <- mt |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    cyl = factor(cyl),
    gear = factor(gear),
    am = factor(am, labels = c("Automatic", "Manual"))
  )

if (requireNamespace("gt", quietly = TRUE)) {
  gt::gt(head(mt, 10)) |>
    gt::tab_header(
      title = "Operational Snapshot"
    ) |>
    gt_theme_chanwe()
}
```

## reactable

```{r}
if (requireNamespace("reactable", quietly = TRUE)) {
  reactable::reactable(
    head(mt),
    theme = reactable_theme_chanwe(),
    defaultPageSize = 6
  )
}
```

## highcharter

```{r}
if (requireNamespace("highcharter", quietly = TRUE)) {
  highcharter::hchart(mtcars, "scatter", highcharter::hcaes(wt, mpg, group = cyl)) |>
    highcharter::hc_title(text = "ChanWe highcharter theme") |>
    highcharter::hc_add_theme(hc_theme_chanwe())
}
```

## Quarto reporting CSS

```{r}
chanwe_reporting_css()
```

In Quarto, set:

```yaml
format:
  html:
    css:
      - !expr chanwer::chanwe_reporting_css()
```

This stylesheet applies ChanWe styling to code blocks, callouts, captions,
and section number accents.
